sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29045" key="dush/tthtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ήττητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29045.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to conquer</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:157" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">157</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
